tool.name: Record Divergence
tool.description: Record a mismatch or divergence between System A and B (Phase 4). Classify as OUT_OF_SCOPE, PATCHABLE, or FATAL.

classification.description: Severity classification: out_of_scope, patchable, or fatal

affected_constraints.description: IDs of constraints affected by this divergence

patch_strategy.description: For patchable divergences, how to address it

scope_restriction.description: For out_of_scope, what domain boundaries to set

ai.systemPromptSection:
### record_divergence
Record a structural mismatch between systems. This is Phase 4 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "name": "Discretization Mismatch", "description": "ML uses discrete parameter updates while physics has continuous dynamics", "classification": "patchable", "affected_constraints": ["ca-2", "cb-2"], "patch_strategy": "Take continuous time limit or use stochastic calculus formulation"}

whenToUse: Documenting where the analogy breaks down
